title: Darrin Arkanian

'''Darrin Arkanian''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. An idealist, Arkanian loved life over any other thing, and struggled to be a model of peace and contemplation. Arkanian assumed the name '''Dimitri Melamor''' as he attempted to resist [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] rule.

==Biography==
Darrin Arkanian was a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]],<ref name="GG9" /> who had a sister named [[Dawn Arkanian|Dawn]].<ref name="AD">{{WEGCite|story=Arkanian Dawn (narrative)|book=Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim}}</ref> Shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Arkanian had reached the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]],<ref name="HNN56">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|56|regional/13516_1.html|Lahara Patrol Attacked, Jedi to Send Aid}}</ref> and had trained several students.<ref name="GA-CV2">{{WEGCite|story=Graveyard of Alderaan|book=Classic Adventures: Volume Two}}</ref> He was assigned to lead a Jedi task force charged with patrolling the border between the [[Oricho sector/Legends|Oricho]] and [[Lahara sector/Legends|Lahara sectors]] after [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] attacked a [[Space Rescue Corps/Legends|Space Rescue Corps]] ship, the ''[[Iron Tether]]'', while it was on deployment near the [[Cowl Crucible]]. The ''Iron Tether'' traveled close to the Lahara sector border, which had seceded from the Republic, prompting an attack from four [[C-73 Tracker starfighter]]s and a modified [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]. Arkanian's task force was charged with patrolling the border and offering security to travelers on the Republic side of the border.<ref name="HNN56" /> Despite the rise of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and his despotic policies, Arkanian believed that as long as the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] trusted in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], no major threats would arise. He soon found that his belief was in error, as the Jedi were [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|hunted down]] at the conclusion of the Clone Wars.<ref name="GG9" />

Arkanian went into hiding, working at a college under the name "Dimitri Melamor," where he became a [[Teacher/Legends|tutor]] to a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] named [[Corwin Shelvay/Legends|Corwin Shelvay]].<ref name="AD" /> He took the young man on as his apprentice,<ref name="GG9" /> and assisted him in constructing a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].<ref name="AD" /> Shelvay was full of good intentions but easy to anger; Arkanian tried to teach Shelvay to control his emotions, while his apprentice tried to convince Arkanian to lead the fight against the Empire. They roamed [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], attempting to unite the scattered remnants of the Jedi Order even as the Emperor continued to hunt them down.<ref name="GG9" /> Arkanian kept in contact with his sister through letter drops, and he and Shelvay traveled to many worlds, including [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]], [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], and [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. While on the galactic [[Capital/Legends|capital]], they tried to keep their presence a secret, but were found out, resulting in Shelvay's capture by the Empire.<ref name="AD" /> Imperial interrogators could not break Shelvay and force him to reveal Arkanian's location, so he was turned over to [[High Inquisitor]] [[Antinnis Tremayne]]. Under Tremayne's ministrations, Shelvay endured two [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] of [[Torture/Legends|torture]] before Arkanian arrived to rescue him.<ref name="GG9" />

As the pair escaped, they headed to rendezvous with a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] owned by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Rashh]]. They were followed by Tremayne, and Arkanian engaged Tremayne in a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] duel. Tremayne, however, had brought reinforcements, who trained their [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] on Shelvay. Tremayne ordered the Sullustan to surrender; Arkanian attempted to trade his life for Shelvay's, but Tremayne struck him with his lightsaber. With Arkanian gravely wounded, Shelvay took up his master's lightsaber and attacked Tremayne, severing his arm below the shoulder and then across his face, blinding him. Shelvay managed to flee with Arkanian. The Jedi Master died a few [[Standard day/Legends|days]] later.<ref name="DV">{{GalaxyCite|8|Dark Vendetta (short story)}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Darrin Arkanian was an idealist and dreamer who had learned to cherish life. He attempted to live his life peacefully and in contemplation.<ref name="GG9" />
